description: "Understanding phase — ask clarifying questions, identify goals, constraints, edge cases and assumptions BEFORE any design or code. Phase 1 of the DevFlow lifecycle."
agent: workspace

# DevFlow — Brainstorm Phase

Run the Brainstormer phase of the DevFlow lifecycle.

## Active Instructions

1. **Read common rules:** `{{SKILLS_DIR}}/shared/rules.md`
2. **Read Skill:** `{{SKILLS_DIR}}/devflow-brainstormer/SKILL.md`
3. **Follow the procedure** defined in the SKILL.md

## Summary

1. Ask clarifying questions (Goal, Scope, Constraints, Feature Type, Definition of Done).
2. Save the Problem Statement to session memory (`context.md`).
3. Initialize `phase-state.md` following [memory conventions]({{SKILLS_DIR}}/shared/memory-conventions.md).
4. If invoked as part of the full lifecycle, the Orchestrator will invoke the Architect next. If invoked standalone, STOP after saving the Problem Statement.

**NEVER** write code, design, or architecture in this phase.
